extensionDescription.message: Autocomplete saved texts and shortcut snippets while typing.

sentencePlaceholder.message: Enter the text you want to save.

popupHelperText.message: Use Arrow Up/Down to switch suggestions and your accept key to insert the selected text.

currentSiteHelper.message: When no sites are listed, the extension works on all sites.

currentSiteStatusAllowed.message: Autocomplete is enabled on this site.

currentSiteStatusBlocked.message: This site is not in the allowed list.

siteUnavailableDescription.message: This tab does not expose a website URL.

settingsHelperText.message: Use a trigger character for shortcuts. Suggestions can be switched with Arrow Up/Down and accepted with your selected key.

allowedSitesHelper.message: Leave this list empty to enable the extension on all sites.

shortcutHelper.message: Type the trigger character and key in the page to expand the saved text.

shortcutValuePlaceholder.message: Paste the text that should be inserted.

clearDataHelper.message: Remove all saved texts, allowed sites, shortcuts, and typing preferences.

duplicateSiteAlert.message: This site is already in the list.
